title: Altunizade Main Campus
content:
Altunizade Main Campus

By clicking on the headings below,

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

Üsküdar University Main Campus is located in Altunizade, one of the most central districts of Üsküdar.

Üsküdar University Main Campus, which is within walking distance to Üsküdar-Çekmeköy Metro and metrobus, offers easy transportation to its students.

Üsküdar University Main Campus provides education in three separate buildings located on Altunizade Mahallesi University Street.

Address

Altunizade Mh. University Street No:14 34662 Üsküdar / Istanbul / Turkey

Transportation to Central Campus

TRANSPORTATION BY METROBUS Transportation by Metrobus provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and crossing the road through the overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Kısıklı Street and turn to İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Street. After 250m you will reach Üsküdar University - Main Campus.

Transportation by Ferry and Motorboat

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. From Üsküdar Square, Kadıköy buses and minibuses will take you to Bağlarbaşı-Altunizade.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

Arriving from D-100 - Edirne/Topkapi Direction:

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar -Kadıköy Turnoff (the second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the Central Campus at University Street No:14.

Arriving from D-100 - Ankara Direction:

Before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge, take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar- Ümraniye. Continue left at the intersection. Continue on Kısıklı Street and arrive at the Central Campus at University Street No:14.

Arrival from TEM Highway:

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the highway. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and arrive at the Central Campus at University Street No:14.

*** Our directional signs are hanging on the lampposts to help you in and around Altunizade.
